acceptance_criteria: CLI validates the example draft task spec
CLI freezes the task spec with a stable spec_hash
CLI generates a bounded Codex prompt from the frozen spec
class_reason: Bounded repo-only contract tooling over the existing curator cockpit MVP skeleton; no runtime, live, API, UI or Codex execution lane is changed.
goal: Materialize local contract tooling for validating, freezing and generating Codex prompts from curator cockpit task specs.
risks: Prompt generation could drift from mandatory governance footer
Policy defaults could accidentally permit live/deploy actions

acceptance_criteria: validate-task-spec returns validation_ok=true for this example
freeze-task-spec writes a frozen spec with stable spec_hash
generate-codex-prompt writes a prompt with mandatory classification and handoff blocks
sprint_steps.goal: Add local validate/freeze/prompt tooling without launching execution.
stop_conditions: The task requires live/deploy/public route operations
The task requires backend endpoints, UI or Codex worker execution
sprint_steps.title: Add curator cockpit MVP local contract tooling

title: Curator cockpit MVP local contract tooling
